content.explanation:
**Should Have — Past Regret & Criticism:**

"Should have" = काश ऐसा किया होता / ऐसा करना चाहिए था (but didn't)

**Structure:** Subject + should have + Past Participle (V3)

🇮🇳 मुझे पहले शुरू करना चाहिए था।
🇬🇧 I **should have** started earlier.

🇮🇳 उसे माफ़ी माँगनी चाहिए थी।
🇬🇧 She **should have** apologized.

**Negative:**
Subject + **shouldn't have** + V3 (= गलती की)
🇮🇳 तुम्हें ऐसा नहीं करना चाहिए था।
🇬🇧 You **shouldn't have** done that.
rules: Should have + V3 = past duty not fulfilled (should kiya tha, but didn't)
Shouldn't have + V3 = past mistake (shouldn't kiya, but did)
V3 = past participle: done, gone, eaten, said, told, called
Expresses regret, criticism, or advice about the past
content.memoryTrick: **Should Have = 'काश' का English** — जब मन में 'काश मैंने...' आए = 'I should have...' जब मन में 'काश नहीं किया' = 'I shouldn't have...'

examples.hindi: मुझे उससे माफ़ी माँगनी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: I should have apologized to him.

examples.hindi: उसे यह secret नहीं बताना चाहिए था।
examples.english: She shouldn't have told that secret.

examples.hindi: तुम्हें डॉक्टर के पास पहले जाना चाहिए था।
examples.english: You should have gone to the doctor earlier.

examples.hindi: हमें उसकी बात सुननी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: We should have listened to him.

examples.hindi: उसे इतने पैसे नहीं खर्च करने चाहिए थे।
examples.english: He shouldn't have spent so much money.

examples.hindi: क्या मुझे वह email भेजनी चाहिए थी?
examples.english: Should I have sent that email?

mistakes.wrong: She shouldn't have to do it.

mistakes.why: V3 = gone even in spoken form

speakingTips: Life lessons share करो: 'I should have studied harder in school.'
Giving feedback: 'You should have informed us earlier.'
Polite criticism: 'Perhaps we should have planned better.'

vocabulary.example: I shouldn't have made that mistake.
I should have grabbed that opportunity.
I should have saved more money.
I should have listened to my parents.

practice.hindi: मुझे पहले उससे बात करनी चाहिए थी।
practice.english: I should have talked to him earlier.
alternatives: i should have spoken to him before.

practice.hindi: तुम्हें doctor को पहले दिखाना चाहिए था।
practice.english: You should have seen the doctor earlier.
alternatives: you should have visited the doctor sooner.

practice.hindi: उसे यह नहीं करना चाहिए था।
practice.english: He shouldn't have done this.
alternatives: he should not have done this.

practice.hindi: मुझे वह opportunity miss नहीं करनी चाहिए थी।
practice.english: I shouldn't have missed that opportunity.
alternatives: i should not have let that opportunity go.

practice.hindi: हमें meeting के लिए पहले prepare करना चाहिए था।
practice.english: We should have prepared for the meeting earlier.
alternatives: we should have gotten ready for the meeting sooner.

practice.hindi: उसे इतना गुस्सा नहीं होना चाहिए था।
practice.english: He shouldn't have gotten so angry.
alternatives: he should not have lost his temper.

practice.hindi: मुझे पहले English सीखना शुरू करना चाहिए था।
practice.english: I should have started learning English earlier.
alternatives: i should have begun studying english sooner.

practice.hindi: उसे वह secret किसी को नहीं बताना चाहिए था।
practice.english: She shouldn't have told that secret to anyone.
alternatives: she should not have revealed that secret.

practice.hindi: क्या मुझे वह email send करनी चाहिए थी?
practice.english: Should I have sent that email?
alternatives: should i have written that email?

practice.hindi: हमें पहले से backup plan बनाना चाहिए था।
practice.english: We should have made a backup plan in advance.
alternatives: we should have prepared an alternative plan.

practice.hindi: तुम्हें वह बात अपने boss को बतानी चाहिए थी।
practice.english: You should have told that to your boss.
alternatives: you should have informed your boss about it.

practice.hindi: उसे ज़्यादा ध्यान से सुनना चाहिए था।
practice.english: He should have listened more carefully.
alternatives: he should have paid more attention.

practice.hindi: मुझे उस time पर हाँ कहनी चाहिए थी।
practice.english: I should have said yes at that time.
alternatives: i should have agreed then.

practice.hindi: हमें project deadline से पहले submit करना चाहिए था।
practice.english: We should have submitted the project before the deadline.
alternatives: we should have handed in the project on time.

practice.hindi: उसे पहले से ही save करना चाहिए था।
practice.english: She should have saved it beforehand.
alternatives: she should have backed it up earlier.

practice.hindi: तुम्हें इतने पैसे खर्च नहीं करने चाहिए थे।
practice.english: You shouldn't have spent so much money.
alternatives: you should not have wasted so much money.

practice.hindi: मुझे उसकी बात माननी चाहिए थी।
practice.english: I should have listened to him.
alternatives: i should have followed his advice.

practice.hindi: उन्हें पहले ही inform करना चाहिए था।
practice.english: They should have informed us earlier.
alternatives: they should have let us know sooner.

practice.hindi: मुझे वह interview better prepare करना चाहिए था।
practice.english: I should have prepared better for that interview.
alternatives: i should have gotten more ready for the interview.

practice.hindi: उसे अकेले यह decision नहीं लेना चाहिए था।
practice.english: She shouldn't have made that decision alone.
alternatives: she should not have decided alone.

practice.hindi: हमें पहले contract check करना चाहिए था।
practice.english: We should have checked the contract first.
alternatives: we should have reviewed the contract before.

practice.hindi: तुम्हें वह बात clearly बोलनी चाहिए थी।
practice.english: You should have spoken clearly.
alternatives: you should have expressed yourself clearly.

practice.hindi: मुझे उस दिन office जाना चाहिए था।
practice.english: I should have gone to the office that day.
alternatives: i should have shown up at work that day.

practice.hindi: उसे credit card use नहीं करना चाहिए था।
practice.english: He shouldn't have used a credit card.
alternatives: he should not have paid by credit card.

practice.hindi: मुझे पहले health insurance लेनी चाहिए थी।
practice.english: I should have gotten health insurance earlier.
alternatives: i should have bought health insurance sooner.

practice.hindi: उन्हें वह file backup करनी चाहिए थी।
practice.english: They should have backed up that file.
alternatives: they should have saved a copy of that file.

practice.hindi: क्या हमें उससे पहले बात करनी चाहिए थी?
practice.english: Should we have talked to her first?
alternatives: should we have consulted her before?

practice.hindi: उसे English class join करनी चाहिए थी।
practice.english: She should have joined an English class.
alternatives: she should have enrolled in an english course.

practice.hindi: मुझे वह chance नहीं जाने देना चाहिए था।
practice.english: I shouldn't have let that chance go.
alternatives: i should not have missed that chance.

practice.hindi: तुम्हें थोड़ा और patient रहना चाहिए था।
practice.english: You should have been a little more patient.
alternatives: you should have shown more patience.
